---
title: "Bayesian Analysis of Aviation Accidents"
author: "Andreas Bogossian & Markus Kruth"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ieee.csl
site-url: https://ajbogo9.github.io/bayesian-fatality-analysis
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: true
---

# Introduction
{{< include subsections/_introduction.qmd >}}

# Data Description
{{< include subsections/_data-description.qmd >}}

# Data Modeling
{{< include subsections/_data-modeling.qmd >}}

# Complete pooling (non-hierarchical model)
{{< include subsections/_complete-pooling-model.qmd >}}

# No pooling (non-hierarchical model)
{{< include subsections/_no-pooling-model.qmd >}}

# Partial pooling (hierarchical model)
{{< include subsections/_partial-pooling-model.qmd >}}

# Model comparison

{{< include subsections/_model-comparison.qmd >}}

# Discussion

- known issues
- potential improvements

# Conclusions

- What was learned?

# Self reflection

- What did the group learn during the project?

# References
